artifacts.purpose: Normalize intake and upsert CRM records before notifying operators.
Issue reusable consent or agreement flows before the next operational step.
Screen, route, and book the right slot before confirmation.
Escalate overdue follow-up and keep consent or onboarding moving.

operatorRules: Prefer reusable templates over one-off flow edits.
Prefer stable external IDs and upsert semantics over create-only writes.
Keep webhook acknowledgements explicit and fast.
Use Novu topics for groups and subscriberId for one-to-one messages.
Use Cal.com routing before booking when qualification matters.
